$comment: Stripe live-mode cutover mapping for Amplify Ann Arbor (Ann Arbor Meals on Wheels). Machine-readable companion to docs/stripe-cutover-inventory.md. Contains NO secret key material of any kind. Generated as step 2 of the sandbox -> live cutover.

activation.note: The Stripe account object is shared across test and live mode; charges_enabled/payouts_enabled/details_submitted reflect the account's real live-activation state. The live Stripe account is fully activated and can accept live charges and receive payouts. Re-verified this iteration by calling GET /v1/account with the deployed key.

sandbox_objects_enumerated.note: Confirms the donate flow stores NO Stripe Price/Product objects and uses NO static Payment Links. There are therefore no sandbox price_ identifiers to mirror; sandbox_price_id is null for every tier because none has ever existed (not because it was unread).

blocker.summary: Live-mode Stripe Price/Product objects cannot be created this step because no live-mode Stripe secret key is present in the builder or deploy environment. The only Stripe secret configured for the site is a test-mode key. The live account itself is fully activated (see activation). Live price_ IDs were left null rather than fabricated: this file is served on the charity's live production site, and inventing fake live identifiers would be dishonest and would break live checkout at the real cutover.
blocker.resolution: Provision a LIVE-mode Stripe secret key (live-mode prefix) for acct_1SpYRlLAJCFZhZvj, then run the committed one-command helper to create the live Price objects and rewrite this file with the real IDs: `STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=<live-secret-key> node scripts/create-live-stripe-prices.mjs` (the key is read only from env; it is never written to the repo, this JSON, or logs). Review the diff, commit, and push. Separately add the live publishable/secret/webhook keys to the Cloudflare Pages 'amplifyannarbor' production secret store for the later checkout cutover step.
checked_this_iteration: Cloudflare Pages 'amplifyannarbor' production env read directly via the Cloudflare API this iteration: the STRIPE_SECRET_KEY value carries the test-mode prefix (not the live-mode prefix) and the publishable key is a test-mode pk_test key — no live-mode secret key is configured (the key value itself is never recorded here or in logs)
Builder shell environment: no live-mode Stripe secret key variable is set
No 'stripe' CLI installed in the builder image
Vault broker (/health reachable) does not vend secrets to builders ('Secrets never go to builders')
No live-mode Stripe key found on disk for this account

notes: This site's donate flow (app/api/create-checkout/route.ts) builds a Stripe Checkout Session with DYNAMIC price_data on every request (mode=payment, currency usd, unit_amount = amount * 100, product 'Donation to Ann Arbor Meals on Wheels'). It uses NO stored Stripe Price/Product objects and NO static Payment Links, so there are no sandbox price identifiers to map (sandbox_price_id is null for every tier). This was re-confirmed by enumerating Stripe objects (see sandbox_objects_enumerated: 0 prices / 0 products / 0 payment links).

Because pricing is env-driven and dynamic, the actual test -> live cutover for this site is an environment-variable key swap in Cloudflare Pages (documented in docs/stripe-cutover-inventory.md), not per-price object creation.
Per mission scope, the checkout/donation flow was NOT switched to any live identifiers and no donation tier, page, or flow was changed. The /version endpoint was not touched.

A committed, idempotent helper (scripts/create-live-stripe-prices.mjs) will create one live Product+Price per tier and rewrite this file with the real live_price_id/live_product_id values the moment a live Stripe secret key is supplied via STRIPE_SECRET_KEY. It refuses to run with a test-mode key and never writes the key anywhere. This is why live_price_id is null rather than fabricated: the real IDs are one command away once a human provisions the live key.
